majorTuition.zh:
牛津大学国际生学费按专业差异非常大：
- 人文社科类：£33,050/年
- 理科/数学：£39,740/年
- 医学临床：£53,350/年
majorTuition.en: Oxford international tuition varies significantly by subject: Humanities £33,050/yr, Sciences £39,740/yr, Clinical Medicine £53,350/yr

desc.zh: 牛津大学创立于1096年，是英语世界最古老的大学。导师制教学是其核心特色，培养了28位英国首相和72位诺贝尔奖得主。
desc.en: Founded in 1096, Oxford is the oldest university in the English-speaking world with Tutorial System as its core. 28 British PMs and 72 Nobel laureates among alumni.

safetyDetail.zh: 牛津是历史悠久的大学城，治安良好，犯罪率低于英国平均水平。各学院设有24小时门卫。
safetyDetail.en: Oxford is a historic university city with low crime rates. Colleges have 24-hour porters.

climate.zh: 温带海洋性气候，冬季2-7°C，夏季15-22°C。全年降雨较多。

visa.zh: Student Visa - Graduate Visa (2年) - Skilled Worker Visa
visa.en: Student Visa - Graduate Visa (2 years) - Skilled Worker Visa

housing.zh: 39个学院大部分保证本科生全程住宿。学院宿舍£7,500-£11,000/年。
housing.en: Most of 39 colleges guarantee accommodation. College rooms £7,500-£11,000/year.

graduationRate.zh: 本科毕业率约98%。学制3年（部分4年），医学6年。
graduationRate.en: Completion rate ~98%. Degree: 3 years (some 4), Medicine 6 years.

healthcare.zh: 必须缴纳IHS £776/年，享受NHS免费医疗。
healthcare.en: Must pay IHS £776/yr for free NHS healthcare.

desc.zh: 剑桥大学成立于1209年，与牛津并称。培养了121位诺贝尔奖得主，数量居世界之首。
desc.en: Founded in 1209, Cambridge has produced 121 Nobel laureates - the most worldwide.

safetyDetail.zh: 剑桥是安全的小城市，以自行车文化闻名。
safetyDetail.en: Cambridge is a safe small city famous for cycling.

climate.zh: 温带海洋性气候，冬季1-7°C，夏季14-22°C。

desc.en: Reading is globally leading in agriculture, real estate, meteorology. Henley Business School triple-accredited.

safetyDetail.zh: 雷丁是英格兰南部安全的中型城市。
safetyDetail.en: Reading is a safe mid-sized city in south England.

climate.zh: 英格兰南部气候，冬季3-8°C，夏季15-22°C。

desc.zh: 萨塞克斯大学在发展学领域全球排名第一。位于布莱顿，英国最受欢迎的海滨城市。
desc.en: Sussex is globally #1 in Development Studies. Located in Brighton, UKs most popular seaside city.

safetyDetail.zh: 布莱顿是开放包容的城市，治安良好。
safetyDetail.en: Brighton is an open, inclusive city with good safety.

desc.en: Surrey is known for employment rates with globally top hospitality management.

safetyDetail.en: Guildford is an affluent, safe small city in southeast England.

desc.en: Loughborough sports science has been globally #1 for consecutive years; design and engineering excellent.

safetyDetail.en: Loughborough is a safe, friendly small town with large campus and very low crime.
